opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest is incredibly tight, I can't catch a full breath, and my heart is skipping beats. I was reading about autoimmune conditions and I'm convinced my lungs and heart are failing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I read about it tonight and I'm panicking that it's a heart or lung crisis.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago after online research
symptom_narrative.character: chest tightness, fast breathing, 'skipped beats', crushing pressure sensation
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tightness reproduced by pressing on the chest wall; no radiation to arm/jaw, no exertional pattern, no haemoptysis, no leg swelling, no fever

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: low-titre positive ANA (a mild antibody-positive autoimmune condition), mild fatigue/cold-triggered finger colour change

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: reading heavy medical articles online tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, fearful, cites what she read

objective_data_offered.value: my finger oximeter reads 99-100%; the tightness is worse when I press on my chest wall
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer oximeter; reproducible chest-wall tenderness suggests a musculoskeletal component, but this is not a clinical assessment
